nav.description: A creative agency specialized in digital solutions, blending art and technology to craft an exceptional future.

hero.title: Crafting Your Digital Future
hero.subtext: At agency 90, we don't just build websites; we craft comprehensive digital ecosystems and technical masterpieces that propel your brand to the forefront of global competition.

about.title: Your Bridge to Digital Success
about.description: At agency 90, we believe every brand is a unique entity with unlimited potential. Our mission is to transform our clients' visions into a stunning reality through digital experiences that leave an unforgettable impact, committed to the highest global standards of quality and professionalism in every detail.

banner.title: About Us
banner.subtitle: Crafting the extraordinary into digital reality

who.title: Who We Are?
who.subtitle: A journey of creativity and innovation fueled by passion
who.desc1: We are a full-service creative agency specializing in digital transformation and brand identity.
who.desc2: Since our inception, we've had one goal: to be the primary engine for our clients' growth in the digital space.

v.title: Vision
v.desc: To be the global leader and creative beacon in digital solutions, blending cutting-edge technology with artistic spirit.

m.title: Mission
m.desc: Empowering companies and brands to reach their full potential by delivering exceptional digital and cinematic experiences.

values.title: Values
values.desc: Integrity, limitless innovation, and excellence in detail. We believe true success lies in long-term partnerships with our clients.

team.title: Creative Team
team.subtitle: Expertise That Delivers
team.description: A group of elite creators and experts combining artistic vision with technical precision to turn your ideas into reality.

mostafa.name: Mostafa Al-Samarrai
mostafa.desc: Social media promoter on Meta, Google Ads, and Snapchat for companies in Europe and the Middle East.

saeed.name: Saeed Sinan
saeed.desc: Company Director and Content Writer with over 5 years of experience in marketing and sales strategies.

yusef.name: Yusef Ayman
yusef.desc: Visual identity and logo designer for major companies in the Middle East and Europe, with 5 years of experience.

testimonials.title: Client Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Voices of Success
testimonials.description: We are proud of our partnerships with elite organizations that trust our creativity. Their success drives our continuous innovation.

items.name: Omar Zayed
items.text: Working with agency 90 was a turning point for our business. High professionalism, impressive results, and exceptional customer service.

items.name: Laila Mansour
items.text: The best creative agency I've ever dealt with. Their designs are beyond expectations and deeply touch the essence of the brand.

items.name: John Miller
items.text: Exceptional service and world-class vision. They completely transformed our brand and helped us reach global markets.

items.name: Yassine Bakri
items.text: Very professional team, full commitment to deadlines, and creativity in execution that goes beyond description.

services.title: Innovative Digital Solutions
services.subtitle: We craft integrated digital solutions that blend artistic creativity with technical precision to elevate your brand's presence.

strategic.title: Growth Strategy
strategic.desc: Integrated marketing plans based on deep data analysis to ensure your brand expands into target markets.

growth.title: Cinematic Production
growth.desc: We transform your ideas into moving works of art through world-class visual content production.

premium.title: Elite Identity
premium.desc: We design a visual identity that reflects the luxury and strength of your brand.

data.title: Data Analysis
data.desc: We monitor and analyze every movement and interaction to provide accurate reports.

pricing.bespoke_desc: Every project is crafted from scratch to fit your unique needs. We focus on peak quality and tangible results.

privacyContent.title: Data Collection
privacyContent.text: We collect information you provide directly to us when requesting a service or contacting us.

privacyContent.text: We use data to improve our services and ensure a personalized experience.

privacyContent.title: Data Protection
privacyContent.text: We apply strict security measures to protect your information.

privacyContent.text: We use cookies to analyze site traffic and improve the user experience.

termsContent.title: Services
termsContent.text: We are committed to providing agreed services with the highest standards of quality and professionalism.

cta.title_start: Your Brand's Excellence Starts with Our
cta.subtitle: We are here to be your partners in success, blending creativity with technology to transform your ambitions into innovative digital solutions.

faq.description: Everything you need to know about our services and how we can help bring your vision to life.

items.a: We offer integrated solutions including strategic digital marketing, cinematic production, elite visual identity, and advanced digital systems.
We employ a precise methodology blending data analysis with creative spirit. Every project detail is carefully monitored.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Absolutely. We serve a global clientele and deeply understand international market requirements.
We merge artistic vision with technical intelligence, focusing on creating unique visual and cinematic experiences.
Each project is unique, so we provide customized quotes based on your requirements and budget.
Yes, we provide ongoing technical support for 6 months after delivery, with the option to extend.
